CAFE LOCUS EST. 2022
The story so far

A quiet corner where the city slows down.

Locus — a point where paths meet. It's the idea the whole room is built around: a single address on Avinashi Road where the light turns gold, the pace drops, and a cup of coffee becomes an occasion rather than an errand.

Every detail, from the beans we roast in small batches to the pastries baked fresh each morning, is chosen with one question in mind — does this make someone want to stay a little longer? Order at the counter, on the app, or call ahead — we'll have it ready.

4.7★584 Reviews

People say

584 reviews, 4.7 stars.

A few, straight from Google.

★★★★★

"The coffee here is genuinely excellent — the flat white is well-balanced and the pastries are baked fresh. Service was attentive, and the atmosphere was calm and pleasant."

S
Shruthi RLocal Guide · 56 reviews
★★★★★

"One of the best cafes I've visited in Coimbatore. The atmosphere is warm and welcoming, and the staff genuinely take care of every table — polite, attentive, always ready to help."

R
Ram KannappanLocal Guide · 9 reviews
★★★★★

"Beautiful interior, quick and thoughtful service, and the cold brew is easily the best in the area. Want a different kind of coffee break on Avinashi Road? Just try here."

Y

Find us

Avinashi Road, right in the heart of Coimbatore.

Look for the gold signage and the wood-and-cream facade — Cafe Locus sits just off Avinashi Road.

Reserve a table

Save your spot on Avinashi Road.

Walk-ins are always welcome, but the corner tables go quickly on weekends — a reservation holds your spot.

We'll confirm by phone within an hour during service hours (8:00 AM – 10:30 PM).
